briefs.title: Council to Consider: Pending Contract Change for Hazardous Material Survey Services
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on a pending contract change that would add $240,000 to an existing hazardous material survey contract, bringing the total estimated contract value to $558,800 over five years.
briefs.action_required: Monitor the council decision if your business provides hazardous material survey or environmental consulting services to the City.
